calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73280982 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 4 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const results = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73280982 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}),
  tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73280982 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000})
]); results.f

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,400p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json && wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/* data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/documents.json && sed -n '1,100p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && rg -n \"^(QUESTION|QUESTIONS|INTRODUCTION|OPINIONS BELOW|JURISDICTION|CONSTITUTIONAL|STATEMENT|REASONS|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|TABLE OF CONTENTS|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|IV\\.)\" data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '45,900p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '900,1665p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '25,760p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '760,1445p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,80p' data/cases/scotus/73280982/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|CVSG|salience band|Ninth|relist|Term 202|paid|Paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '190,360p' metrics/statpack.md && jq '.cert_by_term[]? // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections | keys, .terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '{sections: [.sections[] | {title, scope}], terms: .terms}' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"fedcourts query|--era|--decided-before|query examples|open-events\" docs/cli.md | head -n 120 && sed -n '90,220p' docs/cli.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --topic securities --era 2020s --limit 8","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|case law|legal search|mcp/i.test(`${x.name} ${x.description}`)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && find data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions -maxdepth 3 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 20","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73280982",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260716T205846Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const results = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && for f in data/cases/scotus/73280982/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z/*.json; do jq -e . \"$f\" >/dev/null || exit 1; done","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}),
  tools.exe

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
